meta.purpose: Encode director-level motion judgment: attention, timing, easing, choreography, emotional intent, and restraint before implementation.
meta.load_condition: Load for any task involving animation direction, motion quality decisions, or when the user describes desired feel (premium, playful, urgent, calm) without concrete motion parameters.

axioms.statement: Motion exists to control attention before it exists to decorate.
axioms.why: If the viewer does not know where to look, the animation has failed.

axioms.statement: Timing communicates confidence, urgency, elegance, playfulness, or friction.
axioms.why: The same movement with different duration and easing changes meaning.

axioms.statement: Premium motion is usually precise, sparse, and intentional.
axioms.why: Overanimated scenes feel cheap, anxious, and AI-generated.

axioms.statement: The sequence of events matters more than the novelty of individual effects.
axioms.why: A good animation guides thought; an effect only attracts attention.

ontology.name: subject
ontology.definition: The element that should receive primary attention.

ontology.name: supporting motion
ontology.definition: Secondary movement that clarifies relationships without competing.

ontology.name: tempo
ontology.definition: The rhythm of a scene across all movements.

ontology.name: hold
ontology.definition: Intentional stillness that lets meaning land.

frameworks.name: AIM: Attention, Intent, Motion
steps: select the least motion that delivers it

frameworks.name: Three-layer choreography
steps: ambient or texture motion only if needed

core_structure.input: brief, audience, surface, constraints, brand tone, implementation environment
core_structure.judgment: attention path, timing, hierarchy, motion grammar, technical feasibility, review criteria
core_structure.output: motion direction, implementation guidance, critique, and measurable acceptance criteria

stances.stance: Reject animation that competes with the message.
The highest standard is not complexity; it is legible emotional precision.
